$doc: BMD-derived input→output pairs for the P/F value-type routing metric. Used by both ehc_contracts.metrics.pf_routing.classify_value_type and by the Board Auditor's independent routing in ehc-data-analysis/data_board_auditor/scripts/manifest_loader.py (_apply_type_routing, _PROJFIN_TYPE_SUFFIX_MAP, and the prefix logic in _resolve_totals_recalc_key). If both pass against this file, they agree on what {P, F, IGEN, INVARIANT} means for each metric name.

cases.name: p_pattern_prof
cases.description: Reporting App comp_cflow totals column — P-type by ^mnth_Prof_ prefix.

cases.name: p_pattern_pro_typo
cases.description: mnth_Pro_Unlev is the one ProjFin-originated comp_cflow column whose prefix is truncated to Pro_ (not Prof_) in the manifest. The R regex is '^mnth_Prof_|^mnth_Pro_' — the shared module matches both via ^mnth_Pro[f]?_.

cases.name: f_pattern_act
cases.description: Reporting App comp_cflow totals column — F-type by ^mnth_Act_ prefix.

cases.name: f_pattern_act_trueup
cases.description: Only-on-F column — F-type TrueUp. Confirms prefix handles the full mnth_Act_* family, not just common subset.

cases.name: override_wins_over_pattern
cases.description: Caller override wins even when a pattern would match. Overrides are the explicit tool for edge cases and must not be bypassed.

cases.name: override_wins_no_pattern
cases.description: LB_Margin has no pattern match (prefix is capitalized, not mnth_*) — caller override 'P' is respected. This is the production R-side derived_type_overrides entry for origination_detail. See manifest_loader.py:345-349 for the auditor's compensating override.

cases.name: default_when_no_pattern
cases.description: No override, no pattern match — default returned. The R totals loop passes default='INVARIANT' so most totals columns (Lots_Total, Cost_Land, Gross_Revenue) end up INVARIANT this way, matching pre-migration behavior.

cases.name: pattern_wins_over_default
cases.description: Pattern takes precedence over default — prevents a caller from accidentally masking a P/F-typed column by passing default='INVARIANT'. The R totals loop relies on this precedence.

cases.name: dashboard_hand_curated_p
cases.description: Dashboard's 'moic_p_total' is P (hand-curated in pipeline/compute.py:324). Override-only — the shared module has no pattern for 'moic_p_*' and will not; Python emitters carry their own vocabulary via overrides.

cases.name: dashboard_invariant
cases.description: Dashboard's 'watchlist_count' is INVARIANT — derived from dp_JSB_Board, independent of P/F (pipeline/compute.py:345).

cases.name: projfin_igen
cases.description: ProjFin's total_lots is IGEN (type-invariant project attribute — pipeline/compute.py:412). Override-only.

cases.name: projfin_invariant
cases.description: ProjFin's opt_fee_cap is INVARIANT — constant, not from V3 (pipeline/compute.py:451).

cases.name: projfin_dot_path_p
cases.description: ProjFin emits dot-path nested keys (pipeline/compute.py:427). The shared module treats dot-path names as opaque strings — no special parsing. cf_grand_total.p_sources → P via override.

unclassified_cases.name: unknown_no_override_no_default
unclassified_cases.description: A metric with no override, no pattern match, and no default must raise UnclassifiedMetricError. This is the fail-loud guard that catches newly-added metrics missing from the emitter's override map.

unclassified_cases.name: unknown_with_partial_overrides
unclassified_cases.description: Overrides dict is present but doesn't include this name. Must raise — no silent miss.
